title: The lifecycle command centre
description: 16 phases, 14 stage gates, and the one design every site is built from.

steps.title: Where the programme stands
steps.description: Its phase, and the gate it is waiting on.
steps.voiceScript: This is the command centre. It shows which of the sixteen phases the programme is in, and which gate it is waiting on.
steps.captionText: This is the command centre. It shows which of the sixteen phases the programme is in, and which gate it is waiting on.
steps.fallbackMessage: Where the programme stands: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: The 14 stage gates
steps.description: A gate needs a NAMED AUTHORITY, not just permission.
steps.voiceScript: Each gate must be approved by a named authority. Holding a general approval permission is deliberately not enough -- the gate asks for the role.
steps.captionText: Each gate must be approved by a named authority. Holding a general approval permission is deliberately not enough -- the gate asks for the role.
steps.fallbackMessage: The 14 stage gates: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Lifecycle documents
steps.description: Generated from the programme, not guessed.
steps.voiceScript: Each phase has its real activities. The documents are written from the programme's own answers, not invented.
steps.captionText: Each phase has its real activities. The documents are written from the programme's own answers, not invented.
steps.fallbackMessage: Lifecycle documents: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: The reference design
steps.description: ONE design. Every site is an instance of it.
steps.voiceScript: Now the heart of it. A programme holds one reference design, and every site is an instance of that same design.
steps.captionText: Now the heart of it. A programme holds one reference design, and every site is an instance of that same design.
steps.fallbackMessage: The reference design: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: One design, scaled
steps.description: The BOQ is the same at every site.
steps.voiceScript: Because every site is the same design, the bill of quantities is the same at every site, and the funding requirement is that cost times the number of sites.
steps.captionText: Because every site is the same design, the bill of quantities is the same at every site, and the funding requirement is that cost times the number of sites.
steps.fallbackMessage: One design, scaled: not visible on this screen yet.
